title: Vendor latest containers/image
body:
Catches more errors when checking for login credentials.

Signed-off-by: Urvashi Mohnani <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: Do not merge yet, @mtrmac is opening two more cleanup PRs, will pick those once merged as well.
Should be ready to merge once tests are green.
@rhatdan @nalind @TomSweeneyRedHat any idea why the tests are getting a permission denied error?
Looks to be a Libpod issue as noted by @jlebon in #1085, I'm hoping the soon to be cut Libpod will cure it per @mheon.
@umohnani8 Rebase and repush.  I think the podman selinux issue caused this.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 12523e0) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

:pushpin: Commit 3228977 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 32289770385fde10635aa2c09c2a071623c43fa0 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
